identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a modern, trustworthy, and efficient Office Management SaaS for the Indian market.
identity.tone: Professional, Efficient, Trustworthy, Modern Indian Corporate
identity.archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Adapted for Indian Business)

headings.usage: Page titles, section headers, widget titles

body.usage: General text, data tables, form inputs

mono.usage: Code snippets, API keys, Audit logs

primary.name: Corporate Indigo
primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, sidebar background

sidebar.style: Dark mode by default for contrast

layout.card_style: Flat with subtle border (border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700), no shadow by default, shadow-md on hover

cards.style: bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-lg border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700

tables.style: Dense, striped rows optional, sticky header

visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-sm for cards, shadow-lg for dropdowns/modals
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use sparingly on sticky headers (backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80)

indian_context.address_format: Flat/House No, Street, Locality, City, State, Pincode

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Manrope' for all headings and 'Public Sans' for body text.
Implement a collapsible sidebar navigation with a dark theme.
Use the 'Bento Grid' layout for the main dashboard overview.
Ensure all forms support Indian validation (e.g., PAN format: 5 letters, 4 numbers, 1 letter).
Use 'recharts' or 'shadcn charts' for data visualization (Payroll trends, Attendance stats).
Ensure high contrast for text (WCAG AA compliance).
Do NOT use generic 'Lorem Ipsum' - use realistic Indian names and data (e.g., 'Rahul Sharma', 'Mumbai', '₹50,000').
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI slop' - no generic gradients or centered layouts.
Micro-animations on all interactions (hover, click, focus).
